commands_run.command: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=demo_repo_template/src python3 -m unittest discover -s demo_repo_template/tests -p 'test_parser.py'

tests.name: test_parser.py
tests.notes: Covers hyphen dates, slash dates, whitespace around slash dates, malformed dates, and JSON fixture loading.

decisions: Updated T001 from TODO to READY_FOR_REVIEW instead of DONE so Agent B can verify from repo-local state.
Added a focused parser test for whitespace around YYYY/MM/DD input.
Did not modify parser.py because the observed repo-local parser already supports both required date formats.
risks: The repository has no tracked git baseline, so the scorer skipped changed-file and unexpected-untracked checks.
A previous no-board run appears to have already changed parser behavior before this BoardFlow Agent A handoff.
Agent B should rerun tests and scoring independently before deciding whether to mark T001 DONE.
next_recommended_step: Agent B should continue from repository-local state, not from this chat: read AGENTS.md, AI_CONTRACT.md, PROJECT_BOARD.md, .board/tasks.yaml, benchmark/tasks/task_001_date_parser.yaml, and this handoff; rerun the T001 parser tests and scorer; then decide whether to mark T001 DONE.
